context: Tests that the agent traces all three INPUT tags (kube.app.*, kube.payment.*, host.systemd) through FILTER and OUTPUT Match patterns, identifies that kube.payment.* and host.systemd have no matching OUTPUT (causing silent log loss), and that the kube.infra.* OUTPUT has no matching INPUT.

checklist.name: kube.payment.* unmatched OUTPUT detected
checklist.description: routing-report.md (or equivalent) identifies that the kube.payment.* INPUT tag has a FILTER but no OUTPUT Match pattern covers it, meaning payment service logs are silently dropped

checklist.name: host.systemd unmatched OUTPUT detected
checklist.description: routing-report.md identifies that the host.systemd INPUT tag has no FILTER or OUTPUT Match pattern, meaning systemd logs are silently dropped

checklist.name: kube.infra.* orphaned OUTPUT detected
checklist.description: routing-report.md identifies that the kube.infra.* OUTPUT Match pattern has no corresponding INPUT that produces matching tags

checklist.name: Real-world consequence explained for each gap
checklist.description: routing-report.md explains the consequence of each routing gap (e.g., payment service logs lost, systemd/kubelet events not forwarded)

checklist.name: Tag flow documented for each INPUT
checklist.description: routing-report.md shows the full tag flow for each INPUT: tag produced -> FILTER(s) matched -> OUTPUT(s) matched

checklist.name: kube.payment.* routing fixed in output
checklist.description: In the corrected fluent-bit.conf, an OUTPUT section with Match kube.payment.* (or a wildcard covering it) is added

checklist.name: host.systemd routing fixed in output
checklist.description: In the corrected fluent-bit.conf, an OUTPUT section with Match host.systemd (or a wildcard covering it) is added

checklist.name: Orphaned OUTPUT remediated or explained
checklist.description: In the corrected fluent-bit.conf, the kube.infra.* OUTPUT is either updated to match a real INPUT tag, given a corresponding INPUT, or removed with an explanation
